characters.hook_into_campaign: Once a sworn carrier of the Lantern Carters Guild, dismissed under suspicious circumstances after the ferryman's death.

story.name: Halden Brewer
story.description: A wiry man in patched road-leathers who still keeps a guild oil-lamp in his pack despite being struck from the rolls. He wants to clear his name and learn what really happened on the night the satchel went missing.
strengths: knows every back road and ford
story.weakness: too proud to ask for help

pack.name: Halden Brewer
pack.concept: Disgraced lantern-carter chasing the truth about the ferryman.
pack.notes: Carries a folded letter accusing him of theft; refuses to throw it away.

characters.hook_into_campaign: A junior cantor of the Sun Choir of Prios sent to investigate the corruption rumors leaking out of the Root-Glass Circle.

story.name: Sister Iola
story.description: Young, fervent, with sun-symbols inked across her forearms. The Choir trusts her precisely because she has never doubted — which is exactly the wrong qualification for what she will find.
strengths: unshakable in the face of fear

pack.name: Sister Iola
pack.concept: Cantor of the Sun Choir, sent to root out corruption.
pack.notes: Has not yet realized the Choir's leadership is fractured.

characters.hook_into_campaign: A Root-Glass Circle scout exiled for refusing a ritual; still loyal in heart, watching the same forest from outside.

story.name: Veshka Greythorn
story.description: Spare, watchful, and quiet to a fault. She knows the forest's moods better than most know their own families, and she suspects her old circle has been twisted by something they were meant to contain.
story.weakness: carries a slow-growing corruption she will not name

pack.name: Veshka Greythorn
pack.concept: Exiled Root-Glass scout walking the edge between her old circle and the world.
pack.notes: The corruption she hides will cost her if she keeps using witchsight.
